limitations: R&D figures ($8.5B–$9.9B) are total company R&D, not AI-specific; no AI-dedicated dollar amount or capex figure is isolated in the excerpts, preventing a score of 4 or 5 for investment intensity.

Risk disclosure references specific regulatory regimes (EU AI Act, CCPA) and named threat mechanisms (cyberattack vectors, compliance penalties, talent/data access risks), supporting a score of 4; no quantified risk exposure or named governance body was found to justify a score of 5.
